metadata.title: EXTRACTION ERROR: File Mislabeled — Contains Wrong Document
metadata.error_detail: The file at training/stage-1/fda-guidance-v2/23-hepatic-impairment-studies.pdf does NOT contain FDA guidance on hepatic impairment studies. All 23 pages of this file contain a completely different document: a conference presentation titled 'Challenges in Maintaining Competition in Small Generic Drug Markets II' by Ernst R. Berndt (MIT Sloan School and NBER) and Rena M. Conti (University of Chicago), presented at a U.S. Food and Drug Administration Public Workshop on 'Global Opportunities and Challenges in Using Quantitative Methods and Modeling in Modernizing Generic Drug Development, Regulatory Review and Product Lifecycle Management', October 2-3, 2017, Silver Spring, MD. This document contains economic analysis slides about generic drug market entry/exit rates, manufacturer concentration, and pricing data — it contains zero regulatory rules about hepatic impairment pharmacokinetic studies. The file has been mislabeled or the wrong PDF was placed at this path. Action required: Replace this file with the correct FDA guidance document on hepatic impairment pharmacokinetic studies (the correct document is typically titled 'Pharmacokinetics in Patients with Impaired Hepatic Function: Study Design, Data Analysis, and Impact on Dosing and Labeling' or similar). Once replaced, re-run extraction.
